user_title: Head of Change Execution, WPB Private Banking & Wealth Solutions, Asia Pacific

talking_points.headline: HSBC's ASEAN DPM Push Lands Today — Generational Wealth Shift Demands Immediate Change Execution
talking_points.why_it_matters: HSBC Private Bank's ASEAN product pivot to discretionary mandates and alternatives is live as of this morning, driven by a confirmed generational shift in Thailand and the Philippines — Adam's change execution programmes must absorb this product model change across multiple APAC markets simultaneously.
bullets: Abhishek Mehrotra, Head of Southeast Asia International, HSBC Private Bank confirmed younger wealthy clients are pivoting structurally from brokerage/advisory to DPM — HSBC is responding with a product-model change, not a pilot
Digital DPM capabilities (mobile-first portfolio management) are being deployed in parallel with the commercial push — technology and product delivery tracks must stay synchronised
Deutsche Bank's SEA expansion and Bank of Singapore's ASEAN leadership upgrade from Julius Baer set a competitive clock: HSBC's change execution in ASEAN must demonstrate results before Q3 2026

source_links.title: HSBC PB Targets ASEAN via Discretionary Mandates
Deutsche Bank Hires Julius Baer Exec for SEA

talking_points.headline: HSBC GPB's 3–5-Year Asia Build Needs a Matching Change Execution Runway — Dual-Track Risk Is Live
talking_points.why_it_matters: HSBC Global Private Banking has publicly committed to a 3-to-5-year build across frontline and risk capabilities in Asia — a programme horizon that runs the full length of Adam's change execution mandate and must be resourced for simultaneous growth and talent transition risk.
bullets: Tommy Leung, Head of Global Private Banking South Asia, HSBC confirms HSBC is investing in both frontline RMs and client lifecycle management teams in SEA — two distinct delivery streams creating parallel change execution demand
The build runs concurrent with a wave of senior exits: multiple Singapore desk heads departed in May 2026 alongside the Taiwan offshore co-head — transition risk is active inside the growth phase
Desmond Kuang starts as CIO Asia on July 6, 2026, creating a new third track (investment-led growth strategy) that Adam's programmes must also support from Q3 onwards

source_links.title: HSBC GPB Expands Frontline and Risk Capabilities
Exclusive: Senior Exits at HSBC Private Bank Singapore

talking_points.headline: Julius Baer Has HSBC's Former WPB COO Running Its Operations — Competitive Intelligence Risk Is Material
talking_points.why_it_matters: Jean Nabaa's move from HSBC International WPB/GPB COO to Julius Baer COO means a direct competitor now has a detailed operational map of the programme Adam executes change for — awareness of this intelligence gap is a prerequisite for Adam's change delivery planning.
bullets: Jean Nabaa, COO of Julius Baer (effective April 2026) was most recently COO for HSBC International Wealth and Premier Banking and previously COO for HSBC Global Private Banking — two roles that cover Adam's exact scope

Julius Baer is simultaneously executing a focused Asia growth strategy with coordinated SEA and APAC hires — the operational blueprint Nabaa brings directly informs how they compete with HSBC in Adam's markets

Fiserv's agentOS (enterprise-grade agentic AI for banking, live from August 2026) gives Nabaa and Julius Baer access to the same class of operational AI tools HSBC is deploying — closing HSBC's perceived tech edge

source_links.title: Julius Baer: Jean Nabaa Named COO (ex-HSBC WPB)
Fiserv Launches agentOS for Agentic AI in Banking

HSBC News.title: HSBC PB Targets ASEAN Growth with Discretionary Mandates and Alternatives
HSBC News.summary: HSBC Private Bank is pivoting its ASEAN product model toward discretionary portfolio mandates and alternatives, with market head Abhishek Mehrotra confirming younger wealthy clients in Thailand and the Philippines are driving a structural shift away from brokerage toward DPM — triggering immediate change in how HSBC scales its SEA franchise.

HSBC News.title: HSBC GPB Expands Frontline Bankers and Risk Teams in Asia for 3–5 Year Build
HSBC News.summary: HSBC Global Private Banking announces new relationship manager hires and client lifecycle management team expansion in Southeast Asia, with South Asia head Tommy Leung confirming a 3-to-5-year build combining frontline growth with a strengthened second line of defence — a long-cycle delivery commitment that spans Adam's entire change execution horizon.

HSBC News.title: HSBC Appoints Desmond Kuang as First Dedicated CIO Asia for Private Bank and Premier Wealth
HSBC News.summary: HSBC Private Bank and Premier Wealth names Desmond Kuang as Chief Investment Officer, Asia (effective July 6, 2026), a new regional role covering all asset classes for private banking and premier clients across Asia ex-Hong Kong — signalling that HSBC will compete on proprietary investment IP, not just client relationships, as the primary growth driver.

Competitor Intelligence.title: Julius Baer Installs Ex-HSBC International WPB and GPB COO Jean Nabaa as New Operations Chief
Competitor Intelligence.summary: Julius Baer appointed Jean Nabaa as COO effective April 13, 2026; Nabaa was most recently COO for HSBC International Wealth and Premier Banking and previously COO for HSBC Global Private Banking — giving Julius Baer a deep operational blueprint of HSBC's wealth franchise at the moment it accelerates its own APAC growth.

Competitor Intelligence.title: Hang Seng Private Banking Appoints HSBC Veteran Eric Li as Market Head
Competitor Intelligence.summary: Hang Seng Bank's private banking unit appointed HSBC veteran Eric Li as market head effective June 1, 2026, reporting to head of retail distribution Theodore Mak — marking another senior HSBC-trained talent move into one of HSBC's key Hong Kong subsidiaries as Hang Seng charts an independent course post-privatisation.

Competitor Intelligence.title: Deutsche Bank Private Bank Hires Ex-Julius Baer Team Leader Siang Jin Foo for Southeast Asia
Competitor Intelligence.summary: Deutsche Bank Private Bank hired Siang Jin Foo, former Julius Baer team leader, as a senior hire for its Southeast Asia team in Singapore — part of a coordinated push by Deutsche to deepen SEA private banking coverage that directly competes with HSBC PB's simultaneous ASEAN expansion.

Regulatory & Markets.title: SFC and HKMA Issue Joint AI Cybersecurity Circular — Personal Accountability on Senior Management
Regulatory & Markets.summary: The SFC and HKMA jointly issued a circular on June 2, 2026 requiring all licensed corporations and authorised institutions to immediately strengthen cybersecurity frameworks against AI-enabled cyberattacks, citing a 27% YoY surge in incidents — with personal accountability explicitly placed on senior management including the Manager-in-Charge of IT.

AI & Technology.title: Fiserv Launches agentOS — Enterprise Operating System for Agentic AI in Banking
AI & Technology.summary: Fiserv launched agentOS on May 14, 2026, an enterprise-grade agentic AI operating system built with OpenAI and AWS that enables banks to deploy, manage, and scale AI agents across banking workflows — including risk management, compliance, and back-office reconciliation — with six banks already in co-development and broad availability expected by August 2026.

Private Banking & Wealth.title: HSBC Private Bank Q2 2026 Investment Outlook: Changing Narratives, Continued Opportunity
Private Banking & Wealth.summary: HSBC Private Bank's Q2 2026 investment outlook advises private wealth clients to focus on portfolio resilience through broad diversification rather than market timing, maintaining a barbell strategy in Asia between innovation leaders (Korea, China, Singapore, Japan, Hong Kong) and income-generating assets amid rising volatility.
